inline_comments.message:
why did you remove the python3 target?
all the more as some targets set basepython = python3 (pylint, pep8)

Not sure i follow you - I removed that target and [testenv:py3] section referenced by it because it was unused (no "commands" in that section). It's not needed (that target) to still be able to run "pep8" or "pylint" target.

If you run e.g. "tox -e pylint" it'll still work - tox will spin up virtualenv with basepython Python release (python3 in this case) and run the command.
